impact: Adapter-level route/queue tests are not present yet; existing tests cover shared helpers rather than a production receiver/consumer boundary.
resolution: Added adapter-level webhook receiver and queue coverage: the Stripe route test now exercises the production receiver wiring, and src/lib/__tests__/sqs.test.ts verifies SQS config resolution, signed SendMessage request shape, PHI-safe queue message body boundaries, and SQS failure propagation to retry handling.
title: [test-quality] Adapter-level route/queue tests are not present yet; existing tests cover shared
